name: Ariel's Café
description: Our generous hosts at Shellharbour Civic Centre. Great coffee, great people. Ariel's Café is the warm, welcoming heart of the Shellharbour Civic Centre — the perfect spot for a networking catch-up over a great cup of coffee.

name: Shellharbour Accounting Co.
description: Local tax, bookkeeping and business advisory services for the region. We help Shellharbour businesses stay on top of their numbers so they can focus on what they do best.

name: Coast & Breathe Studio
description: Yoga, pilates and wellness coaching tailored for busy professionals. Coast & Breathe Studio is your coastal retreat for mind and body — helping the Shellharbour community move, breathe and thrive.

name: Harbour Build & Renovate
description: Quality residential and commercial construction across the Illawarra. From new builds to full renovations, Harbour Build & Renovate delivers craftsmanship the Shellharbour community can count on.

name: South Coast Creative Co.
description: Branding, social media and digital marketing for local businesses. South Coast Creative Co. helps Shellharbour and Illawarra businesses look great, tell their story and grow their audience.

name: Shellharbour Realty Group
description: Residential and commercial property services along the coast. Shellharbour Realty Group brings deep local knowledge and genuine care to every property transaction in the region.
